comments.author: @PlanetVista4K
comments.text:
Thank you for exploring Indonesia’s hidden tribal worlds with us 🌿
If you enjoyed this journey, please like, share, and subscribe for more travel documentaries.
👉 Which remote culture should we discover next?

replies.author: @TerraVista-4K
replies.text: I've been watching straight through for over half an hour and I'm still completely hooked. The combination of ambient sounds and the narration creates a truly immersive experience!

comments.author: @GlobeQuest-333
comments.text: Quy tắc nghiêm ngặt của người Badui trong việc từ chối công nghệ hiện đại và canh tác hóa chất là điều mà thế giới hiện đại của chúng ta có thể học hỏi rất nhiều.

replies.author: @PlanetVista4K
replies.text: Cảm ơn bạn đã chia sẻ ý kiến!

comments.author: @MasakApa-l7z
comments.text: Luar biasa, video yang sangat bagus, entahlah  berapa lama planet Vista membuat kumpulan video ini, karena untuk menjangkau lokasinya sangat jauh

replies.author: @PlanetVista4K
replies.text: Terima kasih banyak! ❤️ Kami menghabiskan banyak waktu untuk meneliti dan menyusun dokumenter ini. Negara mana yang ingin Anda jelajahi bersama kami berikutnya?

comments.author: @JasonSabayle-f2e
comments.text: Very informative. Thank you for the video.

replies.author: @PlanetVista4K
replies.text: I’m so glad you found the documentary informative! ✨

comments.author: @alexv3l128
comments.text: 08:40...so where is the original music of the events you picture?

replies.author: @PlanetVista4K
replies.text: Thanks for the feedback! We use background music to keep the viewing experience smooth.

comments.author: @SumuuKijoka
comments.text: ni  michezo  ya  hatari  sana  naangalia  nikiwa  tz

replies.author: @PlanetVista4K
replies.text: Ni kweli, maisha ya makabila hayo ni ya kusisimua na yenye changamoto nyingi sana.
